name: RMW - Desert Eagle
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - Someone at Magnum Research tought "wouldnt it be focken funny to make a semi auto mag fed magnum pistol?" And they did it. Since then it has became the most iconic hand cannon to ever exist. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
